hero.imageAlt: A carriage-house style garage door installed on a craftsman home, clean lines, perfectly balanced, belt-drive opener visible above
hero.headline: Same-Day Service. Done Right.

intro.label: A garage door studio, not a national franchise dispatch
intro.body: A garage door install and service studio serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. Same-day emergency repair, spring and cable replacement done safely, and quiet belt-drive openers installed right — not rushed.

personas.label: Emergency Repair
personas.kicker: For the door that won't cooperate

personas.label: New Door Install
personas.kicker: For the upgrade you've been waiting on

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get a garage door estimate in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Tell us what you need and we'll return a price range before any service call.

zPatternRows.label: Emergency First
zPatternRows.headline: A stuck car or unsecured garage is a right-now problem.
zPatternRows.body: Broken spring, cable off the drum, door stuck open or closed — we prioritize emergency calls. Same-day response for calls before 4pm. We stock common springs and cables so most emergency repairs are done in one visit, not two.

zPatternRows.label: Springs Done Right
zPatternRows.headline: One broken spring means the other is next.
zPatternRows.body: Torsion and extension springs have a cycle rating — typically 10,000–20,000 cycles. If one breaks, the other is at end-of-life. Replacing both at the same visit costs a fraction of a second service call in six months. We'll always tell you the honest answer.

zPatternRows.label: Safety Tested
zPatternRows.headline: Auto-reverse verified to UL 325 before we close the job.
zPatternRows.body: A garage door that doesn't reverse on contact with an obstacle is a safety hazard. Every install and opener replacement is closed with a documented UL 325 reversal test — force limits set, sensor alignment verified, travel limits calibrated. Not just a quick open-close check.

zPatternRows.label: Annual Tune-Up
zPatternRows.headline: The $149 that prevents the $500 emergency call.
zPatternRows.body: Springs, cables, rollers, hinges, and tracks lubricated and inspected. Safety reversal and auto-reverse tested. Catches wear before it becomes a breakdown. Most problems that strand your car at 6am were visible 90 days earlier to a trained eye.

portfolio.caption: Detached garage door + opener · Phinney Ridge

footerCta.headline: Ready for a garage door that works every time?
footerCta.subhead: We'll be in touch within a few hours to schedule a visit.
